name: ProjectsFilesApi
summary: Bluebeam Studio API — Projects / Files endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: CheckoutFile
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/checkout`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: DeleteFileCheckout
methods.summary: Revoke file checkout. This will put the file in a conflicted state in Revu if there are local changes
methods.remarks: HTTP DELETE `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/checkout`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetFileByPath
methods.summary: Get file metadata by path.              Includes DownloadUrl which can be used to download file content
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/by-path`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CreateProjectFile
methods.summary: Create metadata for a new project file.              PUT actual file to UploadUrl returned in a create response              POST confirm-upload at the end of file upload to make it available in a project
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: CRC, Name, ParentFolderId, Size.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ListProjectFiles
methods.summary: Get all files in a project
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CheckoutToSessionFile
methods.signature: Task CheckoutToSessionFile(Guid projectId, Guid id, CheckoutToSessionFileRequest request)
methods.summary: Checkout project file to Studio Session.              This operation will link project to a Session
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/checkout-to-session`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: SessionId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CheckinFile
methods.summary: Checkin project file.              PUT actual file to UploadUrl returned in a create response              POST confirm-checkin at the end of file upload to make it available in a project
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/checkin`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ConfirmCheckinFile
methods.signature: Task ConfirmCheckinFile(Guid projectId, Guid id, ConfirmCheckinFileRequest request)
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/confirm-checkin`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: CRC, Comment, Size.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetRevision
methods.signature: Task GetRevision(Guid projectId, int fileId, Guid id)
methods.summary: Get a file revision metadata.              Includes DownloadUrl which can be used to download file content.              For DownloadUrl of most recent revision use Get /v1/projects/{PublicId}/files/{id}
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{fileId}/revisions/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ConfirmUploadFile
methods.summary: Confirm Project file upload and make it available in a Session. Should be called after uploading project file
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/confirm-upload`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: RestoreRevision
methods.signature: Task RestoreRevision(Guid projectId, int fileId, Guid id)
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{fileId}/revisions/{id}/restore`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetFile
methods.summary: Get file metadata.              Includes DownloadUrl which can be used to download file content
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateFile
methods.signature: Task UpdateFile(Guid projectId, Guid id, UpdateFileRequest request)
methods.summary: Update project file. To move the file, change its parent folder id
methods.remarks: HTTP PUT `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Name, ParentFolderId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: DeleteFile
methods.remarks: HTTP DELETE `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CopyFile
methods.signature: Task CopyFile(Guid projectId, Guid id, CopyFileRequest request)
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{id}/copy`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Name, ParentFolderId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ListFileRevisions
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/files/{fileId}/revisions`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
